title: benkara griffithii
intro: Benkara griffithii, a plant native to the tropical regions of Asia, is a member of the Rubiaceae family and is also known as the Griffith's benkara. The leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. Benkara griffithii is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Benkara griffithii are typically made by boiling the leaves in water, and the resulting infusion is used to treat various ailments.
